title: Iradan Heat Wave
lead: Iradan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.63. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Iradan has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.7 GG. 
 The humidity level is relatively low at 24%, but the wind speed of 6.7 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief. 
 The Heat Wave has resulted in a critical situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, emphasizing the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Iradan immediately.
